english: go ahead! / shoot! / fire away! (used to tell someone to start speaking or acting)
notes: Imperative phrase from 'losschießen'. Used colloquially to encourage someone to start talking or to begin an action. Can also be used literally to command someone to shoot.

sentences.german: Du wolltest mir etwas sagen? Schieß los!
sentences.english: You wanted to tell me something? Go ahead!
